summary: Completed comprehensive testing of GuessIt football prediction platform match data flow - all backend APIs and frontend match display working correctly after the fix
passed_tests: GET /api/football/matches returns actual match data with 47 matches containing homeTeam, awayTeam, competition, status, score fields
Match objects contain all required fields (homeTeam, awayTeam, competition, status, score)
Matches are within expected date range (3-day lookback to +6 days)
Homepage loads and match cards are visible in 'Top Matches' tab (no 'No matches found' message)
League filter chips work: All Matches, Premier League, La Liga, Serie A, Bundesliga, Ligue 1 all present and clickable

Match cards display correctly: team names (Cagliari, Napoli, Leipzig, Hoffenheim, Milan, Bayern), crests/logos, scores for finished matches (0-1, 5-0), FT badges, competition names (Serie A, Bundesliga)
'Soon' tab shows 0 upcoming matches (expected as most current matches are finished)
Vote buttons (1, X, 2) are visible with vote counts and percentages
Advance buttons are present on match cards
Premier League filter works correctly - clicking shows only PL matches
All Matches filter resets and shows all matches
Match status badges (FT for finished matches) display correctly
Team crests and logos are loading properly
Hero banner displays 'Predict Football Matches!' with football imagery
success_percentage: Backend: 100% (11/11 tests passed), Frontend: 100% (19/19 features tested successfully)
